jobs.title: Coaching Institute Enrollment Ad Video
jobs.description:
I need a short, punchy ad video that persuades high-school students to choose my coaching institute and, ultimately, boosts our enrollments. The story should speak their language, show real classroom energy, and finish with a clear call-to-action that pushes them to sign up or request a counselling session right away.

My key points:
• Goal: convert viewers into new enrollments, not just create brand buzz.  
• Audience: teenagers in grades 9–12 who are beginning to think seriously about board exams and entrance tests.  
• Placement: the finished file must look great on YouTube, Instagram Reels

jobs.description:

• Ground floor set aside entirely for covered parking, circulation and service areas.  
• First and second floors should maximise the number of residential units while keeping an equal mix of 3-BHK and 2-BHK apartments.

jobs.title: Ka-Band Audio Down-Conversion
jobs.description:
I have a collection of recorded Ka-band satellite captures stored in a proprietary “K” format. Each file contains the raw RF payload—audio plus embedded data—that now needs to be down-converted into a clean, usable Ka satellite radio signal for further processing on my end.

Your task is to take these recorded files, perform the necessary RF and baseband processing, and deliver the resulting stream in the same Ka satellite radio signal specification that the live system expects. jobs.description:

• Extract accurate quantity take-offs directly from the architectural and structural drawings I will share (DWG/PDF).

jobs.title: Cakes & Pastries Recipe Compilation
jobs.description:
I’m putting together a curated collection of dessert recipes and need help creating clear, kitchen-tested instructions focused exclusively on cakes and pastries.

Here’s what I’m after:
• 15–20 original recipes for cakes, cupcakes, tarts, or puff-pastry treats

• Brief chef’s tips for presentation or flavor variations  
• A short description (1–2 sentences) that captures the dessert’s appeal

jobs.description:
##  Title:

AI-Based Book Publishing Platform (Auto Writing + Publishing + Marketing)

---

##  Description:

Hello Developers,

I want to build a *complete AI-powered book publishing platform* where users can create, publish, and sell books in one place.

This will be similar to a *“Idea → Book → Publish → Sell” system*.

---

##  Core Features Required:

### 1. AI Book Creation System

* User enters book topic
* AI generates:

  * Outline
  * Chapters
  * Full book content
* Support for Hindi & English
